chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-67 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections For hearing of main case. 01.04.2022. Rao Faisal Ali advocate for applicant. Ms. Sana Memon, A.P.G along with ASI Ali Nawaz PS City. == Mr. Aijaz Ahmed Chandio, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of Wahid Bux alias Ajiz Laghari, it is taken on record. At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that the final challan of the case has been submitted by the police by letting-off accused Wahid Bux alias Ajiz Laghari, therefore, he would not press the disposal of instant criminal miscellaneous application before this Court on its merit provided the applicant is permitted to seek joining of let-off accused in trial by making such application before learned Trial Court in accordance with law, which is not opposed by learned counsel for accused Wahid Bux alias Aajiz and learned A.P.G. Order accordingly. JUDGE Muhammad Danish*
